# Heiwa

Heiwa is an iOS soundscape app for creating personal mixes for sleep, focus, reading, and relaxation.

## Primary pages
- https://www.heiwa.fun/
- https://www.heiwa.fun/sleep-sounds
- https://www.heiwa.fun/soundscape-app
- https://www.heiwa.fun/rain-sounds-for-sleep
- https://www.heiwa.fun/offline-sleep-sounds-app
- https://www.heiwa.fun/sleep-sounds-app-with-timer
- https://www.heiwa.fun/brown-noise-and-rain-for-sleep

## Guides
- https://www.heiwa.fun/blogs
- https://www.heiwa.fun/blogs/best-sleep-sounds-for-falling-asleep-faster
- https://www.heiwa.fun/blogs/how-to-create-your-own-sleep-sound-mix
- https://www.heiwa.fun/blogs/white-noise-vs-brown-noise-vs-pink-noise

## Support and policies
- https://www.heiwa.fun/contact
- https://www.heiwa.fun/privacy-policy
- https://www.heiwa.fun/terms
